title: United Heroes: Reborn
description: A completly renewed United Heroes X
body:
![UNITED HEROES REBORN](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bd343e0da3489eea204e75c710e527604f5a3fc.png)
This is a completly renewed United Heroes X, with new and improved features.
## Additions (as of now)
- Netherite Rod - Crafted using 2 Netherite Ingots (Gives 4 Netherite Rods) - Used to make Veridite Tools
- Serum Compound - Made by smelting Unprocesed Serum Compound - Will be used to make super powers
- Unprocesed Serum Compound - Crafted by combining 4 Diamonds, 4 Sugar and 1 Verdite Dust (Gives 2 Unprocesed Serum Compounds) - Used to make Serum Compound
- Verdite - 3.5x stronger than iron - Used to make Serum Compound, Verdite and Caspylium Tools
- Caspylium - 4x stronger than iron - Used to make Caspylium Tools
- Syringe - Crafted using a Caspylium Rod, Glass Block and Iron Nugget - Used to remove powers
- Basic Serum Syringe - Made by brewing a Syringe with Serum Compound - Used to give basic powers, has side-effects
- Advancements
## What's coming next
- Genetic Mutations - Gave to players randomly when they create a world or join a server for the first time - Will give random powers, and sometimes also side-effects, you will be able to get multiple Genetic Mutations if you're lucky, but remember - you can also get bad powers
- Caspylium and Verdite Nerf - They're a bit too strong right now
